scripts.vfs:prepare-mocks: cd crates/vfs && wasm32-wasip1-clang++ --target=wasm32-wasip1 -o llvm_mock.wasm mock_llvm.cpp -mthread-model single -mno-atomics -mno-bulk-memory && cargo build --target wasm32-wasip1-threads -p rustc_mock_crate -r && cp ../../target/wasm32-wasip1-threads/release/rustc_mock_crate.wasm ./rustc_mock.wasm
scripts.vfs:build: cd crates/vfs && wasi_virt_layer build -p vfs ../../page/src/wasm/lsr.wasm ../../page/src/wasm/tre.wasm llvm_mock.wasm rustc_mock.wasm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist', '../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true})"
scripts.vfs:truebuild: cd crates/vfs && wasi_virt_layer build -p vfs ../../page/src/wasm/lsr.wasm ../../page/src/wasm/tre.wasm llvm_opt.wasm rustc_opt.wasm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist', '../../page/src/worker_process/vfs_bindings', {recursive:true})"
scripts.vfs:clean: cd crates/vfs && rm -rf dist target llvm_mock.wasm rustc_mock.wasm
scripts.vfs:prepare-truebuild: bun run vfs:prepare-mocks && bun run vfs:truebuild
scripts.build: bun run vfs:build && bun run --cwd lib build && bun run --cwd page build
